name: SkillBridge
peopleReachedDefinition: Estimated as students enrolled (2,500) × average household size of 3.3 persons, based on Vietnam GSO 2022 urban household data. Includes students and their immediate household members who benefit from increased earning potential.
householdsReachedDefinition: Equal to the 'Students Enrolled' output indicator (2,500). Each student represents one unique household. Based on student registration addresses.
jobsCreatedDefinition: Full-time equivalent (FTE) jobs directly created by SkillBridge: 22 instructors and facilitators, 14 career counselors and placement officers, 12 operations and administrative staff. Verified through payroll and contractor records.

outputs.label: Students Enrolled
outputs.fullName: Students Enrolled in Vocational and Technical Programs
outputs.methodology: Cumulative unique student registrations with at least 80% attendance in their enrolled program

outputs.label: Teachers Trained
outputs.methodology: Count of instructors who completed the SkillBridge pedagogy certification program (minimum 120 hours)

outputs.label: Courses Delivered
outputs.fullName: Vocational Training Courses Completed by Students
outputs.methodology: Cumulative count of course completions (a student completing a 12-week course = 1 completion). Students may complete multiple courses.

outputs.label: People Reached
outputs.fullName: Total individuals in student households reached through SkillBridge programs
outputs.methodology: Derived from enrolled students multiplied by average household size of 3.3 persons (Vietnam GSO data)
outputs.source: Student enrollment data and General Statistics Office household surveys

outputs.label: Jobs Created
outputs.fullName: Direct full-time equivalent jobs created through SkillBridge operations
outputs.methodology: Count of full-time equivalent positions verified quarterly through payroll records

outcomes.label: Job Placement Rate
outcomes.fullName: Graduate Job Placement Rate Within 6 Months (IRIS+ PI3527)
outcomes.methodology: Percentage of program graduates who secured formal employment within 6 months of completion, tracked via phone surveys at 3 and 6 months

outcomes.label: Income Increase Post-Program
outcomes.fullName: Average Income Increase for Graduates vs Pre-Enrollment
outcomes.methodology: Comparison of self-reported monthly income at enrollment vs 12 months post-graduation, adjusted for inflation (n=350)

outcomes.label: Job Retention at 12 Months
outcomes.fullName: Graduates Retaining Employment 12 Months After Placement
outcomes.methodology: Percentage of placed graduates still employed at same or better position 12 months after initial placement, verified by employer calls

outcomes.label: Women Beneficiary %
outcomes.fullName: Percentage of total students who are female
outcomes.methodology: Calculated from sex-disaggregated student enrollment data

financials.label: Revenue
financials.fullName: Semi-annual gross revenue from tuition and course fees, employer partnership placement fees, and corporate training contracts
financials.methodology: Gross revenue on accrual basis per IFRS 15. Includes tuition and course fees, employer partnership placement fees, and corporate training contracts.
financials.source: Audited financial statements and management accounts

financials.label: Valuation
financials.fullName: Fair market value of the fund's equity position
financials.methodology: Fair market value via DCF and comparable transactions.
financials.source: Independent valuation report and management estimate

financials.label: Capital Deployed
financials.fullName: Total committed capital called and deployed

profile.description: SkillBridge provides technology-enabled vocational training and job placement services for underemployed youth in Vietnam's major urban centers. Operating across Ho Chi Minh City, Hanoi, and Da Nang, the platform combines online learning modules with in-person apprenticeships and employer partnerships to equip young workers with digital skills and technical competencies demanded by Vietnam's rapidly growing technology and manufacturing sectors.
profile.theoryOfChange: By providing demand-driven vocational training aligned with employer needs, SkillBridge equips underemployed youth and displaced populations with market-relevant skills, leading to formal employment and increased income. The employer partnership model ensures training curricula match actual labor market demand, resulting in high job placement rates and sustained employment. Economic integration reduces vulnerability and supports social cohesion.
profile.targetBeneficiaries: Underemployed youth aged 18-30 in Ho Chi Minh City, Hanoi, and Da Nang, with a minimum 50% women participants target. Priority populations include rural-to-urban migrants seeking formal employment and youth from lower-income households navigating Vietnam's rapid digital economy growth and urban workforce transitions.
profile.geographicFocus: Ho Chi Minh City, Hanoi, and Da Nang metropolitan areas. 8 training centers with satellite locations in peri-urban districts. Partnerships with 45+ Vietnamese employer organizations across technology, manufacturing, and service sectors.
profile.implementationApproach: Blended learning model: 60% online/self-paced modules + 40% in-person practical workshops and apprenticeships. Employer advisory boards co-design curricula aligned with Vietnam's TVET (Technical and Vocational Education and Training) framework. Partnerships with Vietnamese enterprises and FDI firms provide apprenticeship placements. Job placement support includes interview coaching, resume building, and 6-month post-placement mentoring.
profile.reportingFrequency: Semi-annual (H1/H2) impact reports with tracer studies. Quarterly enrollment and completion data. Annual third-party employment verification survey.
